# image()

**Instance Method**

Returns the image associated with the view, after any image corrections.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func image() -> Unmanaged<CGImage>!
```

## Return Value

The image.

## Getting and Setting Images

- **setImage(_:imageProperties:)**: Sets the image to display in an image view.
- **setImageWith(_:)**: Initializes an image view with the image specified by a URL.
